name: RFL-C1000X-CE
description: 1000W Single Module CW Fiber Laser Source. Third-generation compact design for metal cutting, welding, and engraving. CE certified.

errorCodes.solution: Check water cooling system. Verify chiller temperature. Restart when temp drops below 30°C.
Check coolant flow rate to beam combiner. Inspect water lines for blockages.
Check output head cooling circuit. Clean output lens. Inspect QBH connector.
Increase chiller water temperature. Ensure environment is above 10°C.
Check external interlock wiring. Verify water chiller interlock signal.
Reduce power. Check material compatibility. Inspect protective lens.

errorCodes.description: Power failure — output cannot reach set value
errorCodes.solution: Clean protective lens and fiber end faces. Inspect QBH connector. Run calibration.
Restart laser. If persistent, contact Raycus technical support.
Clean output lens and protective windows. Check fiber for damage.
Check chiller operation. Clean heat exchanger. Verify ambient temperature.
Clean QBH connector and fiber end face with lens tissue and IPA.
